tabs.title: Tab

tabs.content:
SELECT CASE
          WHEN Neighbourhood IS NULL OR Neighbourhood = '' THEN 'Unidentified'
          ELSE Neighbourhood
        END AS Neighbourhood,
        SUM(No_Bikes) AS [Total Number of Bikes]
 FROM Bikestream
 GROUP BY CASE
            WHEN Neighbourhood IS NULL OR Neighbourhood = '' THEN 'Unidentified'
            ELSE Neighbourhood
          END
 HAVING Neighbourhood = 'Chelsea'
 ORDER BY Neighbourhood ASC;
